calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Amend Pleadings By Striking Name Of Attorney And Adding Name Of Plaintiff, And To Correct Clerical Error In Clerk'S Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER (NON-PARTY) LABOR COMMISSIONER's Motion To Amend Pleadings By Striking Name Of Attorney And Adding Name Of Plaintiff, And To Correct Clerical Error In Clerk'S Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

The unopposed "motion to amend pleadings by striking name of attorney and adding name of plaintiff and to correct clerical error in clerk's judgment nunc pro tunc" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
